mapper.select: SELECT l.link_id, l.item_id, l.language_id, l.sort_order, s.name AS language_name, s.content FROM sys_supervision_language_link l LEFT JOIN sys_standard_language s ON l.language_id = s.id WHERE l.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY l.sort_order, l.create_time ASC

SELECT l.link_id, l.item_id, l.regulation_id, l.sort_order, r.name AS regulation_name, r.law_code FROM sys_supervision_regulation_link l LEFT JOIN sys_regulation r ON l.regulation_id = r.id WHERE l.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY l.sort_order, l.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_supervision_language_link (item_id, language_id, sort_order, create_by) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{languageId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy})
INSERT INTO sys_supervision_regulation_link (item_id, regulation_id, sort_order, create_by) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{regulationId}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_supervision_language_link WHERE item_id = #{itemId}; DELETE FROM sys_supervision_regulation_link WHERE item_id = #{itemId};
